summary: Well-organized test suite with good coverage of core functionality (classification, grouping, sorting, output formats) and proper workflow integration testing via act. Strong in happy-path and basic error handling. Notable gaps: missing validation of special markdown/JSON characters in secret names, null/missing RequiredBy fields, negative/zero parameter values, and timezone edge cases. Tests are readable with clear fixtures and good naming, but could be more DRY. Would catch most regressions but some edge cases may slip through.
